subject: [PATCH v4 4/5] mm: rename zone->lock to zone->_lock

2026-03-09.patch_summary: This patch renames the 'lock' field in the Linux kernel's memory management (mm) code to '_lock'. The rename is intended to break direct users of the lock at compile time, forcing them to use wrappers and tracing infrastructure. This change does not introduce any functional changes but rather enforces the use of standardized locking mechanisms. The patch affects various files in the mm directory, including include/linux/mmzone.h, include/linux/mmzone_lock.h, and several C files such as compaction.c and page_alloc.c.
